question: How does Offload work?
answer: Offload is an on-demand laundry pickup and delivery service. Here's how it works in three steps: (1) Schedule a pickup through the Offload app or website — choose your service type, select a pickup window, and drop your laundry in a bag outside your door. (2) A Laundry Partner picks up your laundry and brings it to a vetted local laundromat partner where it's professionally cleaned. (3) Your fresh, clean laundry is delivered back to you at a time that works for your schedule. It's that simple — no trips to the laundromat, no waiting around.

question: How do I place an order?
answer: Download the Offload app (iOS and Android), create a free account with your name, email, and address, then tap 'Schedule Pickup.' Choose your service type (Wash & Fold, dry cleaning, or special items), select your preferred pickup and delivery windows, add any special instructions, and confirm. You'll receive a confirmation notification right away, and real-time updates throughout the process.

question: Do I need to be home for pickup or delivery?
answer: No — that's one of the best parts about Offload. Most customers leave their laundry bag outside their door, in a building lobby, or at a designated spot and go about their day. For delivery, your clean laundry is left at your specified drop-off location. You'll get notifications at every step so you know exactly when your laundry is picked up and when it arrives back home.

question: What happens if I'm not happy with my order?
answer: Your satisfaction matters to us. If there's a problem with your order — a missed item, a washing issue, or something that doesn't look right — contact our support team at support@offloadusa.com or through the app within 14 days of delivery. We'll review the situation and work to make it right. For garment damage or loss, we have an industry-leading claims process with one of the highest reimbursement caps in the industry (see our damage policy below).

question: Can I schedule recurring orders?
answer: Yes. Offload supports recurring pickup schedules — weekly, bi-weekly, or on whatever cadence works for you. Set it up once in the app and we'll automatically schedule your pickups. You can pause, adjust, or cancel recurring orders at any time through your account settings with no fees.

question: How does Offload pricing work?
answer: Offload's standard Wash & Fold service is priced by the bag. When you schedule a pickup, you'll see the per-bag price for your area. We use standardized bag sizes — simply fill your bag and we'll take care of the rest. If your laundry weighs more than the standard bag limit, a small per-pound overage charge applies. You'll always see your estimated total before confirming, and we'll notify you of any overages before your card is charged.

question: What are overage charges and how do they work?
answer: Each Offload laundry bag has a standard weight limit. If your laundry exceeds that weight, we charge a small per-pound overage fee. You'll see your estimated charge at checkout. When our Laundry Partner weighs your items, if there's a significant overage, we'll notify you through the app before processing the additional charge. You always have the option to remove items before the order proceeds if you'd prefer to avoid the overage.

question: Are there any hidden fees?
answer: No. Offload displays all applicable fees before you confirm your order: the base bag price, any delivery fee, estimated taxes, and an indication of the potential authorization hold amount. The only charge that can differ from your estimate is an overage fee for heavier-than-expected laundry, and we notify you before charging that. There are no surprise fees after delivery.

question: What does the service price include?
answer: Your Wash & Fold price includes: professional laundering at a vetted local laundromat, commercial-grade detergent (we use a gentle, effective formula by default), fabric softener (unless you opt out), folding and packaging your clean laundry, and return delivery to your door. You can specify fragrance-free or hypoallergenic detergent preferences in your account settings at no extra charge.

question: How much does dry cleaning cost?
answer: Dry cleaning is priced per item, and prices vary by garment type (suits, dresses, coats, etc.). You'll see the per-item pricing when you select dry cleaning as your service type. Items are individually tagged, cleaned, and returned on hangers in protective garment bags. There is no minimum order for dry cleaning when combined with a Wash & Fold order.

question: Does Offload offer subscription or membership plans?
answer: Yes. Offload memberships give you discounted per-bag pricing, waived or reduced delivery fees, and priority scheduling. Memberships auto-renew monthly (or annually for our best rate) and can be cancelled any time through your account settings. If you cancel within 30 days of your first paid membership and haven't placed any orders, you're eligible for a full refund of your membership fee.

question: What areas does Offload serve?
answer: Offload currently serves select neighborhoods in the New York metropolitan area, with ongoing expansion. Enter your address in the app or on offloadusa.com to see if service is available at your location. We're growing fast — if we don't serve your area yet, you can join the waitlist and we'll notify you when we launch nearby.

question: How fast is Offload's turnaround time?
answer: Standard Offload orders have a 24–48 hour turnaround from pickup to delivery. We offer next-day delivery for orders placed before the daily cutoff time in your area. Same-day service may be available in select areas — check the app for current availability. Dry cleaning and special items typically require 48–72 hours. Exact timing is always shown when you schedule your order.

question: Can I choose when my laundry is picked up and delivered?
answer: Yes. When you schedule an order, you select from available pickup windows (typically 2-hour blocks) and delivery windows for your return. You can also request a specific delivery date. The app shows real-time availability so you can choose what works best for your schedule.

question: What laundry services does Offload offer?
answer: Offload offers: (1) Wash & Fold — everyday laundry washed, dried, and folded; (2) Dry Cleaning — professional dry cleaning for suits, dresses, delicate fabrics, and formal wear; (3) Delicate Care — hand-wash-appropriate or gentle-cycle items requiring special attention; (4) Special Items — oversized items like comforters, duvets, blankets, and rugs (priced per item). Check the app for the full current menu of services in your area.

question: Can Offload clean comforters, duvets, and pillows?
answer: Yes. Comforters, duvets, and large bedding items are available as special items in the Offload app. These are priced per item (not by bag weight) because of their size and special handling requirements. They're cleaned at our partner laundromats using commercial-grade machines designed for oversized items. Select 'Special Items' when scheduling your pickup to add comforters and similar items to your order.

question: What items does Offload NOT accept?
answer: For safety and quality reasons, Offload does not accept: wet or heavily soiled items with hazardous materials (paint, chemicals, biohazards), items with bed bugs or pest infestation, items requiring only handwashing that are submitted as Wash & Fold, leather or suede (contact us for dry cleaning options), rugs larger than 8×10 feet, or items with a declared value over $1,000 per piece. If you're unsure about a specific item, email support@offloadusa.com before placing your order.

question: What should I do to prepare my laundry for pickup?
answer: A few simple steps make everything go smoothly: (1) Check pockets — remove all items from pockets, including cash, keys, earbuds, and small valuables. Offload is not responsible for items left in pockets. (2) Separate dry cleaning from Wash & Fold in separate bags. (3) Note any special care instructions in the app's order notes. (4) For delicate items, consider adding a note about specific care requirements. That's it — we handle the rest.

question: Can I cancel or modify my order?
answer: You can cancel your order at no charge before a Laundry Partner has been dispatched to your location. To cancel, open your order in the app and tap 'Cancel Order.' If a Laundry Partner is already en route, a cancellation fee of up to $10 may apply. Once your laundry has been picked up and is in process at the laundromat, orders cannot be cancelled. To modify an order (e.g., add special instructions), contact support@offloadusa.com as early as possible.

question: What is Offload's cancellation policy?
answer: Cancellations before dispatch: Free, no charge. Cancellations after a Laundry Partner is dispatched (en route): Up to $10 cancellation fee. Cancellations after pickup: Not available — the order is already in process. For recurring orders, you can pause or cancel upcoming pickups anytime through account settings without penalty, as long as you cancel before the dispatch window.

question: What happens if a garment is damaged or lost?
answer: If a garment is damaged or lost due to Offload's error, you must notify us in writing at support@offloadusa.com within 14 days of your delivery date. Include clear photos of any damage and, if possible, proof of purchase or the item's fair market value. We'll acknowledge your claim within 24 hours and resolve it within 5 business days. Offload assesses damage and loss claims on a case-by-case basis, taking into account documented value and condition. We believe in fair resolutions and will work with you to make it right.

question: What garment issues is Offload not responsible for?
answer: Like all professional laundry services, Offload is not responsible for: normal wear and tear (fading, shrinkage, pilling, button loss), damage to items submitted for a service that contradicts the care label (e.g., 'dry clean only' sent as Wash & Fold), incomplete stain removal for set-in stains, items left in pockets, pre-existing damage not caused by us, or loss/damage after confirmed delivery to your drop-off location. We always recommend checking care labels before ordering and noting any fragile items in your order instructions.

question: What is the 14-day claim window?
answer: You have 14 days from your delivery date to report any damage or loss claims. This window gives you time to unpack and inspect your laundry, while also ensuring claims are filed while the details are fresh and documentation is still available. Claims submitted after 14 days unfortunately cannot be accepted. To submit a claim: email support@offloadusa.com with photos and a description within that window.

question: What payment methods does Offload accept?
answer: Offload accepts all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), and Offload account credits. Payment is securely processed through our payment partner — we never store your full card number on our servers. You can manage your saved payment methods in the app's account settings.

question: When am I charged for my order?
answer: When you place an order, Offload may place a temporary authorization hold on your payment method for slightly more than your estimated order total — this accounts for potential overages (actual laundry weight, special handling). The hold amount is shown at checkout. Your card is charged the final, verified amount when your order is completed and your laundry has been delivered. The temporary hold releases automatically if not captured, typically within 3–5 business days.

question: Are tips included in the price?
answer: Tips are not included in your order total and are entirely optional. If you'd like to tip your Laundry Partner, you can do so through the app during checkout or up to 24 hours after delivery. 100% of your tip goes directly to your Laundry Partner (minus a small payment processing fee). Your decision to tip or not tip has no effect on the quality or priority of your service.

question: Does Offload have a loyalty or rewards program?
answer: Yes. Offload Rewards lets you earn points on every order. Points can be redeemed for service credits, free bags, and exclusive member perks. You earn points automatically on every completed order when you're logged into your account. Check the Rewards section of the app to see your current balance and available rewards. Members on subscription plans earn bonus points on every order.

question: Does Offload offer referral bonuses?
answer: Yes. Share your unique referral link from the app with friends and family. When a new customer completes their first order using your referral code, you'll both receive a credit toward your next order. Referral credits are applied automatically to your account and can be combined with other promotions. See the app for current referral bonus amounts.

question: Who does my laundry — Offload employees or independent contractors?
answer: Offload is a marketplace platform that connects you with independent laundry service providers and local laundromat partners. Our Laundry Partners are independent contractors, not Offload employees. They set their own hours and work methods, but must meet Offload's quality and service standards to remain on the platform. Offload conducts background checks and quality monitoring on all Laundry Partners.

question: How does Offload vet its Laundry Partners?
answer: All Laundry Partners on the Offload platform undergo identity verification and background screening before their first order. Partner laundromats are evaluated for equipment quality, hygiene standards, and service reliability. We continuously monitor order quality through customer ratings and feedback, and we remove partners who don't meet our standards. Your feedback on every order directly informs our quality monitoring.

question: Can I request a specific Laundry Partner for my order?
answer: After your first completed order with a particular Laundry Partner, you can mark them as a favorite in the app. When you schedule future orders, we'll do our best to assign your preferred partner — but availability varies. If your preferred partner isn't available, we'll assign the next best-rated partner in your area.

question: How do I contact Offload support?
answer: Our support team is available 7 days a week. You can reach us through: (1) In-app chat — tap the chat icon in the bottom-right corner of any screen; (2) Email — support@offloadusa.com (we respond within a few hours during business hours); (3) Phone — (800) 555-OFLD; (4) Website — offloadusa.com. For urgent issues like a missed pickup or delivery problem, in-app chat or phone is the fastest way to reach us.

question: What are Offload's support hours?
answer: Our customer support team is available 7 days a week from 7am to 10pm Eastern Time. For urgent order-related issues (e.g., a driver can't find your location, a pickup is running very late), use in-app chat for the fastest response. For non-urgent inquiries, you can email support@offloadusa.com at any time and we'll respond within one business day.

question: What if my pickup is running late?
answer: If your Laundry Partner is delayed, you'll receive an in-app notification with an updated estimated arrival time. If your pickup window passes without contact or pickup, please reach out through in-app chat or call (800) 555-OFLD immediately so we can dispatch an alternative partner. We monitor all active pickups and proactively reach out if we detect significant delays.

question: Can I change my delivery address after placing an order?
answer: Address changes may be possible if the order hasn't been picked up yet. Contact our support team through in-app chat or at support@offloadusa.com as quickly as possible with your new delivery address. Once the order is in transit for delivery, address changes may not be possible, and a re-delivery fee may apply for returned or re-routed orders.

question: Is my personal information safe with Offload?
answer: Yes. Offload takes your privacy seriously. We use industry-standard encryption for all data in transit and at rest. We do not sell your personal information to third parties — ever. Your payment information is processed by PCI-DSS-compliant payment processors and your full card number is never stored on our servers. We share your information only with Laundry Partners (as needed to fulfill your order), our service providers, and when required by law. See our full Privacy Policy at offloadusa.com/legal/privacy for complete details.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: You can request account deletion by emailing support@offloadusa.com or using the 'Delete Account' option in your app settings. Deleting your account will remove your personal information (subject to legal retention requirements), order history, loyalty points, and saved preferences. Outstanding order obligations and payment duties must be settled before deletion is processed. We'll confirm deletion within 5 business days of your request.
